list.definition:
SELECT distinct
  user
FROM ${Server}_user_history
where shard in ($Shards)
list.name: Users
list.query:
SELECT distinct
  user
FROM ${Server}_user_history
where shard in ($Shards)

list.definition:
SELECT distinct
  room
FROM ${Server}_room_history
where shard in ($Shards)
and user in ($Users)
list.name: Rooms
list.query:
SELECT distinct
  room
FROM ${Server}_room_history
where shard in ($Shards)
and user in ($Users)
